sentences.hanzi: 这个国家有很长的历史。
sentences.pinyin: zhège guójiā yǒu hěn cháng de lìshǐ.
sentences.english: This country has a very long history.

sentences.hanzi: 每个公民都应该了解法律。
sentences.pinyin: měi gè gōngmín dōu yīnggāi liǎojiě fǎlǜ.
sentences.english: Every citizen should understand the law.

sentences.hanzi: 新闻报道了最近的变化。
sentences.pinyin: xīnwén bàodào le zuìjìn de biànhuà.
sentences.english: The news reported recent changes.

sentences.hanzi: 政府建了很多新学校。
sentences.pinyin: zhèngfǔ jiàn le hěn duō xīn xuéxiào.
sentences.english: The government built many new schools.

sentences.hanzi: 这件事需要大家一起讨论。
sentences.pinyin: zhè jiàn shì xūyào dàjiā yīqǐ tǎolùn.
sentences.english: This matter needs everyone to discuss together.

sentences.hanzi: 教育跟不上，什么都白搭。
sentences.pinyin: jiàoyù gēn bu shàng, shénme dōu bái dā.
sentences.english: If education can't keep up, nothing else matters.

sentences.hanzi: 他们正在制定新的计划。
sentences.pinyin: tāmen zhèngzài zhìdìng xīn de jìhuà.
sentences.english: They are making new plans.

sentences.hanzi: 这个决定影响了很多人。
sentences.pinyin: zhège juédìng yǐngxiǎng le hěn duō rén.
sentences.english: This decision affected many people.

sentences.hanzi: 医院太少了，看病还得排好长的队。
sentences.pinyin: yīyuàn tài shǎo le, kànbìng hái děi pái hǎo cháng de duì.
sentences.english: There aren't enough hospitals — you still have to wait in really long lines.

sentences.hanzi: 安全是最重要的。
sentences.pinyin: ānquán shì zuì zhòngyào de.
sentences.english: Safety is the most important thing.

sentences.hanzi: 报纸上说了什么？
sentences.pinyin: bàozhǐ shàng shuō le shénme?
sentences.english: What did the newspaper say?

sentences.hanzi: 这个问题很复杂。
sentences.pinyin: zhège wèntí hěn fùzá.
sentences.english: This problem is very complex.

sentences.hanzi: 这些规定不是卡你，是怕出事。
sentences.pinyin: zhèxiē guīdìng bú shì kǎ nǐ, shì pà chū shì.
sentences.english: These rules aren't there to block you — they're to prevent accidents.

sentences.hanzi: 跟十年前比，变化确实挺大的。
sentences.pinyin: gēn shí nián qián bǐ, biànhuà quèshí tǐng dà de.
sentences.english: Compared to ten years ago, things really have changed a lot.

sentences.hanzi: 我关注了这个新闻。
sentences.pinyin: wǒ guānzhù le zhège xīnwén.
sentences.english: I followed this news story.

sentences.hanzi: 老师对学生很好。
sentences.pinyin: lǎoshī duì xuéshēng hěn hǎo.
sentences.english: The teacher is very good to the students.

sentences.hanzi: 这里的人都很好。
sentences.pinyin: zhèlǐ de rén dōu hěn hǎo.
sentences.english: The people here are all very nice.

sentences.hanzi: 我们都要去学校。
sentences.pinyin: wǒmen dōu yào qù xuéxiào.
sentences.english: We all need to go to school.

sentences.hanzi: 新的交通法规从下个月开始实施。
sentences.pinyin: xīn de jiāotōng fǎguī cóng xià gè yuè kāishǐ shíshī.
sentences.english: The new traffic regulations will be implemented starting next month.

sentences.hanzi: 政府想让企业多招点人。
sentences.pinyin: zhèngfǔ xiǎng ràng qǐyè duō zhāo diǎn rén.
sentences.english: The government wants businesses to hire more people.

sentences.hanzi: 市民可以通过网络平台反映问题。
sentences.pinyin: shìmín kěyǐ tōngguò wǎngluò píngtái fǎnyìng wèntí.
sentences.english: Citizens can report issues through online platforms.

sentences.hanzi: 这次改革的目标是提高行政效率。
sentences.pinyin: zhè cì gǎigé de mùbiāo shì tígāo xíngzhèng xiàolǜ.
sentences.english: The goal of this reform is to improve administrative efficiency.

sentences.hanzi: 纳税是每个公民应尽的义务。
sentences.pinyin: nàshuì shì měi gè gōngmín yìng jìn de yìwù.
sentences.english: Paying taxes is an obligation every citizen should fulfill.

sentences.hanzi: 选举结果将在下周公布。
sentences.pinyin: xuǎnjǔ jiéguǒ jiāng zài xià zhōu gōngbù.
sentences.english: The election results will be announced next week.

sentences.hanzi: 反腐败斗争取得了显著成效。
sentences.pinyin: fǎn fǔbài dòuzhēng qǔdé le xiǎnzhù chéngxiào.
sentences.english: The anti-corruption campaign has achieved notable results.

sentences.hanzi: 预算公开制度增强了政府财政的透明度。
sentences.pinyin: yùsuàn gōngkāi zhìdù zēngqiáng le zhèngfǔ cáizhèng de tòumíngdù.
sentences.english: The budget transparency system has enhanced the transparency of government finances.

sentences.hanzi: 各部门之间的协调配合对政策落实至关重要。
sentences.pinyin: gè bùmén zhījiān de xiétiáo pèihé duì zhèngcè luòshí zhìguān zhòngyào.
sentences.english: Coordination between departments is crucial for policy implementation.

sentences.hanzi: 依法行政是建设法治政府的基本要求。
sentences.pinyin: yī fǎ xíngzhèng shì jiànshè fǎzhì zhèngfǔ de jīběn yāoqiú.
sentences.english: Administering according to law is the basic requirement for building a government ruled by law.

sentences.hanzi: 社会保障制度的覆盖范围正在逐步扩大。
sentences.pinyin: shèhuì bǎozhàng zhìdù de fùgài fànwéi zhèngzài zhúbù kuòdà.
sentences.english: The coverage of the social security system is gradually expanding.

sentences.hanzi: 信息公开条例保障了公民的知情权。
sentences.pinyin: xìnxī gōngkāi tiáolì bǎozhàng le gōngmín de zhīqíngquán.
sentences.english: Freedom of information regulations safeguard citizens' right to know.

sentences.hanzi: 权力的制约与监督是防止权力滥用的根本保障。
sentences.pinyin: quánlì de zhìyuē yǔ jiāndū shì fángzhǐ quánlì lànyòng de gēnběn bǎozhàng.
sentences.english: The restraint and supervision of power are the fundamental safeguards against the abuse of power.

sentences.hanzi: 地方政府在执行中央政策时需要因地制宜地进行调整。
sentences.pinyin: dìfāng zhèngfǔ zài zhíxíng zhōngyāng zhèngcè shí xūyào yīn dì zhì yí de jìnxíng tiáozhěng.
sentences.english: Local governments need to make adjustments according to local conditions when implementing central policies.

sentences.hanzi: 立法程序的完善有助于提升法律条文的科学性与可操作性。
sentences.pinyin: lìfǎ chéngxù de wánshàn yǒuzhù yú tíshēng fǎlǜ tiáowén de kēxuéxìng yǔ kě cāozuòxìng.
sentences.english: Improving legislative procedures helps enhance the scientific nature and operability of legal provisions.

sentences.hanzi: 政务服务'一网通办'大幅降低了企业和群众的办事成本。
sentences.pinyin: zhèngwù fúwù 'yī wǎng tōng bàn' dàfú jiàngdī le qǐyè hé qúnzhòng de bànshì chéngběn.
sentences.english: The 'one-stop online' government service has significantly reduced administrative costs for businesses and the public.

sentences.hanzi: 行政审批制度的简化有效激发了市场主体的活力。
sentences.pinyin: xíngzhèng shěnpī zhìdù de jiǎnhuà yǒuxiào jīfā le shìchǎng zhǔtǐ de huólì.
sentences.english: The simplification of administrative approval procedures has effectively stimulated the vitality of market entities.

sentences.hanzi: 第三方评估机制为公共政策的效果评价提供了独立客观的参考依据。
sentences.pinyin: dì sān fāng pínggū jīzhì wèi gōnggòng zhèngcè de xiàoguǒ píngjià tígōng le dúlì kèguān de cānkǎo yījù.
sentences.english: Third-party evaluation mechanisms provide independent and objective reference for assessing the effectiveness of public policies.

sentences.hanzi: 行政问责机制的缺失往往导致公共政策执行力的弱化。
sentences.pinyin: xíngzhèng wènzé jīzhì de quēshī wǎngwǎng dǎozhì gōnggòng zhèngcè zhíxínglì de ruòhuà.
sentences.english: The absence of administrative accountability mechanisms often leads to weakened execution of public policies.

sentences.hanzi: 央地关系的动态调整是国家治理体系优化的重要维度。
sentences.pinyin: yāng dì guānxì de dòngtài tiáozhěng shì guójiā zhìlǐ tǐxì yōuhuà de zhòngyào wéidù.
sentences.english: The dynamic adjustment of central-local relations is an important dimension of optimizing the national governance system.

sentences.hanzi: 公共政策的制定应当充分考虑各利益群体的合理诉求。
sentences.pinyin: gōnggòng zhèngcè de zhìdìng yīngdāng chōngfèn kǎolǜ gè lìyì qúntǐ de hélǐ sùqiú.
sentences.english: The formulation of public policy should fully consider the reasonable demands of various interest groups.

sentences.hanzi: 司法独立原则要求审判活动不受行政干预和舆论压力的左右。
sentences.pinyin: sīfǎ dúlì yuánzé yāoqiú shěnpàn huódòng bù shòu xíngzhèng gānyù hé yúlùn yālì de zuǒyòu.
sentences.english: The principle of judicial independence requires that trials not be swayed by administrative interference or public opinion pressure.

sentences.hanzi: 财政联邦制的制度设计需要在中央统筹与地方自主之间确立清晰的权责边界。
sentences.pinyin: cáizhèng liánbāngzhì de zhìdù shèjì xūyào zài zhōngyāng tǒngchóu yǔ dìfāng zìzhǔ zhījiān quèlì qīngxī de quánzé biānjiè.
sentences.english: The institutional design of fiscal federalism requires establishing clear boundaries of authority and responsibility between central coordination and local autonomy.

sentences.hanzi: 公共选择理论揭示了官僚体系内部预算最大化的自利倾向。
sentences.pinyin: gōnggòng xuǎnzé lǐlùn jiēshì le guānliáo tǐxì nèibù yùsuàn zuìdàhuà de zìlì qīngxiàng.
sentences.english: Public choice theory reveals the self-interested tendency toward budget maximization within bureaucratic systems.

sentences.hanzi: 新兴技术对传统监管框架构成了前所未有的挑战，亟需制度层面的系统性回应。
sentences.pinyin: xīnxīng jìshù duì chuántǒng jiānguǎn kuàngjià gòuchéng le qiánsuǒwèiyǒu de tiǎozhàn, jíxū zhìdù céngmiàn de xìtǒngxìng huíyìng.
sentences.english: Emerging technologies pose unprecedented challenges to traditional regulatory frameworks, urgently requiring systematic institutional responses.

sentences.hanzi: 治理能力现代化要求在顶层设计与基层实践之间建立有效的反馈回路。
sentences.pinyin: zhìlǐ nénglì xiàndàihuà yāoqiú zài dǐngcéng shèjì yǔ jīcéng shíjiàn zhījiān jiànlì yǒuxiào de fǎnkuì huílù.
sentences.english: Modernizing governance capacity requires establishing effective feedback loops between top-level design and grassroots practice.

sentences.hanzi: 跨国治理机制的构建面临着主权让渡与全球公共产品供给之间的深层博弈。
sentences.pinyin: kuàguó zhìlǐ jīzhì de gòujiàn miànlín zhe zhǔquán ràngdù yǔ quánqiú gōnggòng chǎnpǐn gōngjǐ zhījiān de shēncéng bóyì.
sentences.english: The construction of transnational governance mechanisms faces a deep-level game between sovereignty concession and the supply of global public goods.

sentences.hanzi: 数据治理立法的滞后使得公民数字权利的保护面临制度性真空。
sentences.pinyin: shùjù zhìlǐ lìfǎ de zhìhòu shǐde gōngmín shùzì quánlì de bǎohù miànlín zhìdùxìng zhēnkōng.
sentences.english: The lag in data governance legislation has left the protection of citizens' digital rights facing an institutional vacuum.

sentences.hanzi: 协商民主的制度化实践要求在程序规范与实质参与之间构建可操作的制度衔接。
sentences.pinyin: xiéshāng mínzhǔ de zhìdùhuà shíjiàn yāoqiú zài chéngxù guīfàn yǔ shízhì cānyù zhījiān gòujiàn kě cāozuò de zhìdù xiánjiē.
sentences.english: The institutionalization of deliberative democracy requires building operable institutional links between procedural norms and substantive participation.

sentences.hanzi: 政策实验的'央地互动'模式在降低改革风险的同时保留了制度创新的弹性空间。
sentences.pinyin: zhèngcè shíyàn de 'yāng dì hùdòng' móshì zài jiàngdī gǎigé fēngxiǎn de tóngshí bǎoliú le zhìdù chuàngxīn de tánxìng kōngjiān.
sentences.english: The 'central-local interaction' model of policy experimentation preserves elastic space for institutional innovation while reducing reform risks.

sentences.hanzi: 制度变迁的路径依赖效应表明，治理改革的突破往往受制于既有权力结构的惯性约束。
sentences.pinyin: zhìdù biànqiān de lùjìng yīlài xiàoyìng biǎomíng, zhìlǐ gǎigé de tūpò wǎngwǎng shòuzhì yú jìyǒu quánlì jiégòu de guànxìng yuēshù.
sentences.english: The path dependence effect of institutional change shows that breakthroughs in governance reform are often constrained by the inertia of existing power structures.

sentences.hanzi: 合法性的再生产机制在于治理绩效与程序正义的持续耦合。
sentences.pinyin: héfǎxìng de zài shēngchǎn jīzhì zàiyú zhìlǐ jìxiào yǔ chéngxù zhèngyì de chíxù ǒuhé.
sentences.english: The reproduction mechanism of legitimacy lies in the sustained coupling of governance performance and procedural justice.

sentences.hanzi: 国家能力建设的核心悖论在于：强化治理效能的同时须防范行政权力对社会自主空间的过度侵蚀。
sentences.pinyin: guójiā nénglì jiànshè de héxīn bèilùn zàiyú: qiánghuà zhìlǐ xiàonéng de tóngshí xū fángfàn xíngzhèng quánlì duì shèhuì zìzhǔ kōngjiān de guòdù qīnshí.
sentences.english: The core paradox of state capacity building is that strengthening governance efficacy must simultaneously guard against the excessive erosion of societal autonomous space by administrative power.

sentences.hanzi: 官僚理性化进程中韦伯式效率追求与民主回应性之间的内在紧张，构成了现代行政国家的根本困境。
sentences.pinyin: guānliáo lǐxìnghuà jìnchéng zhōng wéibó shì xiàolǜ zhuīqiú yǔ mínzhǔ huíyìngxìng zhījiān de nèizài jǐnzhāng, gòuchéng le xiàndài xíngzhèng guójiā de gēnběn kùnjìng.
sentences.english: The inherent tension between Weberian efficiency pursuit and democratic responsiveness in the process of bureaucratic rationalization constitutes the fundamental dilemma of the modern administrative state.

sentences.hanzi: 多层级治理体系中责任归属的模糊化，使得政策失败的问责往往陷入制度性的'责任漂移'。
sentences.pinyin: duō céngjí zhìlǐ tǐxì zhōng zérèn guīshǔ de móhuhuà, shǐde zhèngcè shībài de wènzé wǎngwǎng xiànrù zhìdùxìng de 'zérèn piāoyí'.
sentences.english: The blurring of responsibility attribution in multi-level governance systems often causes accountability for policy failure to fall into institutional 'responsibility drift.'

sentences.hanzi: 治理正当性的来源正从传统的输入端合法性向输出端绩效合法性发生结构性转移。
sentences.pinyin: zhìlǐ zhèngdāngxìng de láiyuán zhèng cóng chuántǒng de shūrù duān héfǎxìng xiàng shūchū duān jìxiào héfǎxìng fāshēng jiégòuxìng zhuǎnyí.
sentences.english: The source of governance legitimacy is undergoing a structural shift from traditional input-side legitimacy toward output-side performance legitimacy.
